README.md.reason: Baseline Factory guidance for this run.

playbooks/devin-bicameral-factory-run.md.reason: Factory-run checklist, including direct collaborator sessions.

blueprints/factory-run-contract.md.reason: Factory run boundaries and required outputs.

skills/bic/release-unit/SKILL.md.reason: Release Unit proposal and assignment workflow.

local_setup_divergence.notes: The direct Codex session used exact Factory skill copies and an ignored local Factory context file. No local-only setup artifact or assumption is required by the product change.

roadmap_reconciliation.notes: Host configuration preservation is reliability and operational hygiene within the validated Miscellaneous roadmap.

state_refinement.release_state: Existing adapter lifecycle operations now fail closed when external host configuration cannot be safely parsed or replaced. No new canonical Bicameral state, authority, or persistence is introduced.
states_deferred: The product-facing config_invalid_fail_closed status remains owned by BicameralAI/bicameral-mcp#762.
invariants: A missing host config may be created, but an existing config must be a readable JSON object before any mutation.
Malformed, non-object, or unreadable host config fails closed with its original bytes unchanged.
A valid existing config is backed up byte-for-byte before same-directory atomic replacement.
Lifecycle mutations edit only Bicameral-managed hooks and preserve unrelated host configuration.
No Factory runtime artifact, canonical Bicameral state, or daemon authority moves into MCP.

rejected_or_collapsed_states: No persisted adapter state was added for invalid host configuration; this remains a fail-closed product-local error until #762 adds the planned user-facing status refinement.
minimization_review.rationale: The narrowest safe change strengthens filesystem mutation semantics without widening the adapter state model or crossing product authority boundaries.

state_refinement.notes: Lifecycle failure behavior changed; canonical state and authority did not.

domain_entity_candidates: None. HostConfigError is a product-local implementation detail rather than reusable Factory vocabulary.
factory_learning_signals: DispatchGrant wording should distinguish provider-dispatched work from direct supervised collaborator development; the updated product plan now makes that distinction explicit.
Release Unit proposal guidance should expose an authoritative active Release Plan lookup path so target-version selection does not rely on repository version files and non-authoritative examples.

validation_evidence.preflight: Scoped Bicameral preflight returned fired=false and no_matches before and after implementation.
validation_evidence.artifact_boundary: Built wheel contains no Factory context, skills, attestations, receipts, or roadmaps.
validation_evidence.release_unit_proposal: Factory validator returned valid=true with no errors.

end_of_session_capture.notes: No reusable Factory artifact was changed in this product PR. Two Factory learning signals are recorded for human review in the product PR and roadmap comment.

session: direct supervised local development for BicameralAI/bicameral-mcp#758
